task_description: Execute Phase 14 (Infrastructure, Deploy, Observability, SRE) and Phase 15 (Growth, Onboarding, Launch Experience) of the Quant Ecosystem autonomous plan. Phase 14 adds metrics endpoint, request-ID propagation, trace-ID in logs, SLO burn-rate alerts, canary analysis rules, cost dashboards, rollback/environment documentation. Phase 15 creates a full onboarding package with account/workspace/role flows, demo mode, import flows, AI setup, privacy wizard, and notification preferences.

verification.summary: All gates pass: typecheck 73/73, build 52/52, test 76/76, lint 62/62, audit 0 high. Tests exercise real flow logic and code paths.
